tags.name: om-map
tags.description: The map root. Layers, overlays, behaviors, widgets, and stories are children.

attributes.name: basemap
attributes.description: Basemap: a registered preset name, "maplibre" (demo style), a style URL, or "none" (standalone canvas).

attributes.name: basemap-key
attributes.description: Provider API key for keyed basemap presets (maptiler-*) — publishable origin-restricted key; or call OmMap.configureBasemap once.

attributes.name: attribution
attributes.description: Set "false" to opt out of the compact attribution control shown with basemaps.

attributes.name: lighting
attributes.description: Scene lighting preset for 3D content — seeds ambient/sun/camera values that lighting-* attributes override. Absent = deck.gl default lights.

attributes.name: lighting-sun
attributes.description: Sun (directional light) intensity; 0 removes the sun.

attributes.name: lighting-sun-azimuth
attributes.description: Sun compass bearing, degrees clockwise from north [0, 360).

attributes.name: lighting-sun-elevation
attributes.description: Sun height above the horizon, degrees [0, 90].

attributes.name: lighting-sun-date
attributes.description: ISO 8601 or epoch ms — computes the sun's azimuth/elevation from solar position at the map center (shadow studies). Overrides azimuth/elevation.

attributes.name: lighting-camera
attributes.description: Camera-following fill light intensity (model inspection); 0 removes it.

attributes.name: terrain
attributes.description: 3D elevation surface: a registered terrain preset, a {z}/{x}/{y} DEM URL (needs terrain-decoder), or "off". Replaces an active basemap while on. Geographic layers drape by default (per-layer terrain attribute overrides).

attributes.name: terrain-decoder
attributes.description: DEM RGB decoder: "terrarium", "mapbox-rgb", or {rScaler,gScaler,bScaler,offset} JSON. Required for raw DEM URLs; presets carry their own.

attributes.name: terrain-exaggeration
attributes.description: Vertical relief multiplier, applied in the DEM decoder; 1 = true relief.

attributes.name: terrain-max-zoom
attributes.description: DEM tileset zoom cap — the provider's REAL limit (a too-high cap requests 404 tiles and blanks the terrain).

attributes.name: terrain-texture
attributes.description: Optional {z}/{x}/{y} imagery template draped over the surface (satellite, etc.).

attributes.name: validate
attributes.description: Run manifest validation and show the on-page error panel.

attributes.name: map-id
attributes.description: Optional authored UUID identifying this map artifact (telemetry dedup across visits/pages — not a visitor id). Opt-out: delete it.

attributes.name: license-key
attributes.description: OnlyMapJS license token (om_live_…) — lifts the free-tier limits (5 layers / 25k rows per layer) and removes the badge. Publishable, origin-restricted; or call OmMap.configureLicense once.

attributes.name: telemetry
attributes.description: Set "off" to disable usage telemetry for this map (global opt-out: OmMap.configureTelemetry).

tags.name: om-layer
tags.description: A deck.gl layer declared as markup — attributes map to props (kebab-case), get-* attributes compile as accessors.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Layer id — referenced by behaviors, steps, widgets, and overlay anchors.

attributes.name: data
attributes.description: Data URL (JSON, GeoJSON, CSV/TSV, Arrow/GeoArrow IPC, Shapefile .shp, KML) or wss:// stream; omit for inline <script type="application/json">.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Human-readable name shown in the legend and layer list.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Shorthand fill color (hex or CSS color) — also the legend swatch.

attributes.name: pickable
attributes.description: Enables hover/click picking for behaviors and tooltips.

attributes.name: filter-field
attributes.description: GPU filter field (DataFilterExtension) — pair with filter-range.

attributes.name: filter-soft-range
attributes.description: Soft edges "[min, max]" for the filter.

attributes.name: filter-category
attributes.description: Categorical GPU filter field — pair with filter-categories.

attributes.name: filter-categories
attributes.description: JSON array of categories to keep.

attributes.name: highlighted-id
attributes.description: Feature id to highlight (set by the highlight-feature action).

attributes.name: terrain
attributes.description: Behavior under an active map terrain: drape onto the surface, offset (sit on it — the 3D-model default), or off. Absent = the type default.

attributes.name: key
attributes.description: Stream entity identity field — messages upsert by this key (wss data).

attributes.name: refresh
attributes.description: Polling interval for REST snapshots, e.g. "5s" — each poll replaces the data.

attributes.name: source
attributes.description: registerSource decoder plugin name for stream messages.

attributes.name: get-position
attributes.description: Accessor for deck.gl getPosition — expression language: $field, scale(), arithmetic.

attributes.name: get-fill-color
attributes.description: Accessor for deck.gl getFillColor — expression language: $field, scale(), arithmetic.

attributes.name: get-line-color
attributes.description: Accessor for deck.gl getLineColor — expression language: $field, scale(), arithmetic.

attributes.name: get-radius
attributes.description: Accessor for deck.gl getRadius — expression language: $field, scale(), arithmetic.

attributes.name: get-line-width
attributes.description: Accessor for deck.gl getLineWidth — expression language: $field, scale(), arithmetic.

attributes.name: get-point-radius
attributes.description: Accessor for deck.gl getPointRadius — expression language: $field, scale(), arithmetic.

attributes.name: get-elevation
attributes.description: Accessor for deck.gl getElevation — expression language: $field, scale(), arithmetic.

attributes.name: get-text
attributes.description: Accessor for deck.gl getText — expression language: $field, scale(), arithmetic.

tags.name: om-overlay
tags.description: Rich HTML anchored to the map: a static coordinate, the current selection, or a feature's own geometry.

attributes.name: anchor-layer
attributes.description: Anchor to a feature of this layer (with anchor-feature-id).

attributes.name: anchor-feature-id
attributes.description: Feature id to anchor to — bbox center for polygons/lines.

attributes.name: anchor-offset
attributes.description: Attachment point relative to the anchor.

attributes.name: layer
attributes.description: Scope selection-anchored overlays to one layer's picks.

tags.name: om-fallback
tags.description: Static fallback shown only when the library never boots — JS-disabled contexts like chat-app/email file previews (iOS QuickLook), file managers, sandboxed webviews. Direct child of <om-map>; hidden automatically once the map upgrades. Good practice on any page that may be shared as a file. Without one, the stylesheet shows a text-only default banner. Requires onlymapjs.css to load without JS (link tag / bundled / inlined).

tags.name: om-behavior
tags.description: Declarative event → action wiring. Every other attribute becomes a payload key (kebab→camel).

attributes.name: layer
attributes.description: Only picks on this layer trigger the behavior.

tags.name: om-widget
tags.description: Map UI chrome — built-in types or inline <script type="om/widget"> render logic.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Built-in widget type (omit for a custom scripted widget).

attributes.name: watch
attributes.description: Space-separated watch tokens: viewport, selection, layers, history, basemap, lighting, terrain, data:<layerId>.

attributes.name: target
attributes.description: Draw widget: store the sketch feeds — bind a layer with data="draw:<target>".

attributes.name: modes
attributes.description: Draw widget: space-separated tools to show.

attributes.name: save
attributes.description: Draw widget: how Save persists the GeoJSON.

attributes.name: autosave
attributes.description: Draw widget: localStorage key — mirrors the sketch and restores it on reload.

attributes.name: options
attributes.description: Basemap-switcher: space-separated preset names to offer (default: every keyless registered preset).

tags.name: om-story
tags.description: A guided tour: time → action. Steps reference layers/overlays by id — never contain them.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Story id — referenced by the player widget and story-* actions.

attributes.name: interrupt
attributes.description: What user camera gestures do to playback.

tags.name: om-step
tags.description: One story step: action="…" plus payload attributes, or a bare effect verb (trace / pulse / fade / populate).

attributes.name: action
attributes.description: Action to dispatch at this step's time.

attributes.name: duration
attributes.description: How long the step's animation runs ("3s", "800ms"); also passed to the action.

attributes.name: parallel
attributes.description: Start with the previous step instead of after everything before it.

attributes.name: trace
attributes.description: Effect verb: progressive draw (whole TripsLayer, or one feature with feature-id).

attributes.name: fade
attributes.description: Effect verb: animate opacity to `to` over duration.

attributes.name: populate
attributes.description: Effect verb: rows drop in one by one (GPU filter sweep).

attributes.name: curve
attributes.description: Arced flight path instead of a linear ease (fly-to).
